languageStep.title: Which language would you like to learn?
languageStep.subtitle: Choose your first goal to start a new adventure with Hurra Lingo.

audienceStep.title: Which program is right for you?
audienceStep.subtitle: Help us personalize your learning journey.

birthYearStep.title: What year was your child born?
birthYearStep.subtitle: Select the birth year so we can match the most suitable curriculum and teacher for their age group.

levelStep.title: What is your current language level?
levelStep.subtitle: Let's determine the right starting point; we'll always confirm together during your free introductory lesson.

goalStep.title: What is your learning goal?
goalStep.subtitle: We'll shape your program around your goal and select content and practice accordingly.

personalStep.title: One last step!
personalStep.subtitle: Share your contact details so we can create your personalized program and schedule your free introductory lesson.

payment.title: Payment details
payment.subtitle: Complete the final step to secure your program. Your payment is processed through a secure infrastructure.

success.title: Great, everything is ready!
success.subtitle: Your payment has been received and your request has reached us. Our team will contact you shortly to launch your program.

audiences.title: For my child
audiences.subtitle: Ages 4–18
audiences.description: A game-based, age-appropriate, and fun curriculum.

audiences.title: For myself
audiences.subtitle: 18 and over
audiences.description: Flexible programs focused on career, travel, and daily life.

goals.title: Professional Life
goals.description: Focused on career and professional communication.

child.title: No knowledge
child.description: Will be introduced to this language for the first time.

child.title: Knows a little
child.description: Recognizes a few words and phrases.

self.title: Upper Intermediate
self.description: Can speak comfortably on most topics.

ui.paymentSecurity: Your payment is encrypted with 256-bit SSL. Your card details are not stored.

form.privacyNote: Your information is used only to offer you the most suitable program.

validation.phone: Enter a valid phone number. (e.g. +90 5xx xxx xx xx)
